text.message: I'm thinking I'm not a fan of oj right now
We can trade if you want black
I give it to you if you give me first wood
why would you ever do that
why is everybody so sensitive here\
if you want me to fight army
I dont know what you're saying
he has the 1 at the bottem to
so you let him take army
so your win con goes down
I'd just like to point out that I have 3 numbers and oj has 7 number. For your consideration
and you want to win too
Do you think I should solo the 10 ore over the 8 sheep?
no you should block his 8 then
yeah but for you better if we fight no?
Which is why I block both
You want me to make it easier for you
Well mostly cause you didn't accept the nb so it would be weird
But you did, just only after
Well it depends on rolls and devs
my prio became to block you
nah you should think about it earlier
I've blocked blue every single time
You act like I solod your 4
i no.... we talked about it man
Yeah, he has a sheep port
It still helps to block the 8
yes but if you block his other 8 you let me catch up un army
but not mine so we can compeet
And you couldd just use those knights to block me anyway
and he need to keep deving
well i cant explain in any better
I'd rather do the more overall effective block
Otherwise it's leaving too much up to assumption
yes but long term for your own game
Like that you 2 will focus rob each other over me
that is the better thing for you
Only assuming you dont knight me
Even if he has army, I'll still prio my blocks on him, that gives you room to catchup
If you have city, get trades, go unblocked
I need you to understand that black is playing with you
i try to explain him something lol
he didnt say anything to me what to do lol
With the kind of things people believe
Not surprising that religions get as big as they do
Also you guys have all the time in the world to feed oj road
And you are talking like a waterfall
You've gotten 3 devs and city. Surely you had a 4
oj should take trades for road
Idk if hes just afk or slow or what
Cause it just hurts himself staying at 8
I just know I have even when someone's got a clear lead
But people get upset at me for doing the honorable thing
You realize I cant get road anymore, right?
yes thats why i say blue
Can you at least honor the nb now?
i wasnt the block here anyway
My port depends on the trades
had no good block on blue
Even before, you refused the trade
Even tho ur just gonna block me anyway
Not even trying to make up for it
I can tell you right now
Oj, ill be happy when this game is done. The peace and quiet
You're just spam lying over and over...
Literally from the start with your second settle
You don't need to gaslight on top
There's no money on the line here
dude nobody give win we all have win in hand
So lame the way you spam lie red
